sentences.translation: Godina je završila i tim se okupio za proslavu.
sentences.translationEn: The year ended and the team gathered to celebrate.

sentences.arabic: أَحْضَرَ كُلُّ وَاحِدٍ طَعَامًا مِنَ الْبَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Svako je donio hranu od kuće.

sentences.arabic: تَكَلَّمَ الْمُدِيرُ وَشَكَرَ الْفَرِيقَ عَلَى عَمَلِهِمْ طَوَالَ السَّنَةِ.
sentences.translation: Direktor je govorio i zahvalio timu na radu tokom cijele godine.
sentences.translationEn: The manager spoke and thanked the team for their work throughout the year.

sentences.arabic: ضَحِكَ الْجَمِيعُ وَتَمَنَّوْا سَنَةً جَدِيدَةً أَفْضَلَ.
sentences.translation: Svi su se smijali i željeli bolju novu godinu.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone laughed and wished for a better new year.
